overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character in a leather trench coat walking through a futuristic rainy London. The character navigates wet city streets, passes modern architecture including a distinctive geometric building, and approaches a London Underground entrance featuring futuristic holographic displays.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
character begins crossing the wet street toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet asphalt intersection toward the sidewalk on the far side

notable_agents.action: brown car waiting at the red traffic light
person crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: tall black pole with vertical traffic lights showing red
classical stone building with columns and multiple windows
curved contemporary building with dark glass facade
modern building with distinctive triangular metal framework exterior

segments.scene_description: The character starts at a city intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the overcast sky. After the traffic light changes to green, the character crosses the road, passing a waiting car on the right. Classical and modern architecture mix in the background as the character approaches the far sidewalk.

events.description: moving from street onto sidewalk alongside fenced park with white flowers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a fenced park area with white flower beds and autumn trees

notable_agents.action: woman in grey dress walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard with yellow background and black text
black metal fence separating sidewalk from landscaped park
black vertical banner with gold Albion logo and triangular design

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved sidewalk bordered by a black metal fence and park with white flowers. A yellow advertisement billboard stands on the right, while the geometric glass building looms ahead. The modern curved building shifts to the left as the character progresses.

events.description: passing the entrance of the geometric building with stone steps
turning slightly left toward the large intersection with the cylindrical building

agents.ego_description: walking past the geometric building and approaching a large intersection dominated by a cylindrical tower

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt and dark pants walking past
red double-decker bus approaching the intersection

entered.detail: large rounded building with horizontal glass bands and metallic structure
red brick structure with metal framework and covered walkway
tall stone clock tower with spire visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the geometric building's entrance with stone steps, moving into a more open plaza area. The large cylindrical glass tower becomes prominent ahead, while a historic clock tower appears on the left. A red double-decker bus approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with transit hub

events.description: crossing the wide intersection toward the Underground station
futuristic holographic red circle materializes above the Underground entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the London Underground entrance while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man with black umbrella walking toward the station entrance

entered.detail: large circular London Underground sign with red circle and blue bar
stairs leading down to the subway entrance with glass canopy
large glowing red circular holographic projection above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection toward the London Underground station. The cylindrical tower falls behind as a large red Underground sign becomes prominent. A futuristic holographic red circle suddenly appears above the station entrance, pulsing with light as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: London Underground entrance with holographic installation

events.description: approaching the Underground entrance stairs under the holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking toward and descending the stairs into the London Underground entrance, passing under the holographic display

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking up the stairs from the Underground

entered.detail: white and black futuristic motorcycle parked near the entrance
vertical digital screen displaying purple and pink graphics
glass doors at the bottom of the stairs leading into the station

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Underground entrance, walking under the large pulsing holographic red circle. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character descends the stairs toward the station doors. Futuristic motorcycles are parked nearby, and digital advertising screens line the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London cityscape that transitions from a wet street intersection to the futuristic entrance of an Underground station. It begins with the character crossing a road of reflective asphalt past a waiting car, moving toward a sidewalk bordered by a black metal fence and white flowers. As the character progresses, the scene shifts from a mix of classical architecture to a modern urban plaza, passing a geometric glass building and a historic clock tower while a red double-decker bus approaches the intersection. The camera then follows the character across a wide crossing, leaving a cylindrical tower behind as a large red Underground sign and a pulsing red holographic circle emerge ahead. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the character passes parked futuristic motorcycles and digital screens to descend the stairs into the station.
